name: Denial Fighter Bundle
description: Everything you need to analyze, appeal, and prevent claim denials.
use_case: Revenue cycle teams fighting claim denials with AI-assisted policy lookup, clinical evidence gathering, and coding validation.
workflows: Appeal letter support with clinical citations

mcps.why: NCD/LCD policy lookup identifies coverage criteria. ICD-10 tools validate coding accuracy. NPI tools verify provider credentialing.
Clinical literature strengthens medical necessity arguments in appeal letters.

example_prompts: Look up the NCD for hyperbaric oxygen therapy and tell me the covered indications
Search PubMed for evidence supporting the medical necessity of IV immunoglobulin for CIDP
Validate ICD-10 code E11.65 and show me the full hierarchy for Type 2 Diabetes
Find the LCD for my region covering power mobility devices
Check if adalimumab is on the SAD exclusion list
